subcodes.title: Words to Ali Kuli Khan, spoken on 1906-06-10
subcodes.first_line: Paul and Peter, the Apostles, once went into one of the cities of the Greeks and engaged in teaching the Truth. In that city, there was a temple
subcodes.subjects: @Saint Peter and Saint Paul, @early Christian persecutions; the Pharisees, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @growth of the Cause, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
